problem id: 130a5dff
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10000000 -> 00000100
  00101011 -> 10110001
  11100010 -> 00100111
  11110100 -> 01000111
  00000110 -> 01100000
  10010001 -> 00010100
  11100011 -> 00110111
  11110101 -> 01010111
  01011100 -> 11000010
  00100011 -> 00110001

query: 10100011
predicted answer: 00110101
